findings.title: Wrapper report lacks a concise top summary
findings.recommendation: Add a captain summary before detailed tables.

tasks.title: Add concise captain summary to wrapper report
tasks.userPain: The captain needs to understand the wrapper outcome quickly from a phone.
tasks.change: Add a short captain summary before the detailed report sections.
tasks.guardrails: Do not touch product repos, secrets, deploy config, auth, payments, packages, or locks.
tasks.acceptance: Generated report starts with Captain Summary and Next Captain Action.
tasks.proof: Run fleet tests and inspect a fixture wrapper report.
tasks.stopIf: Report generation touches product repos or broadens scope.
